feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Scope Item 5HP: Combine several stock transport orders into one outbound delivery
entry.content:
Hi there, 

I am looking for a way to combine several stock transport orders with the same goods recipient into one outbound delivery in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud. 

Process flow:

  1. Create intercompany stock transport orders > ME21N - Create Purchase Order - Advanced
  2. Create replenishment delivery for stock transport order  > VL10B My Purchase Orders - Due for Delivery

In the second step, I am looking for a way to select several stock transport orders and combine them into one outbound delivery.

Thanks and best regards, 

Matthias

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: SAP TM public cloud manually change between FTL and LTL
entry.content:
Hi Community,

In our S/4HANA Public Cloud tenant we use Transportation Management.
When I create a Road Freight Order I only get one document type – SFO2 (Road Freight Order) – and it is hard-wired to Shipping Type 18 (FTL).
The Shipping Type field itself is read-only, and the usual SSCUI “Define Freight Order Types” (103983) does not exist in Public Cloud.

Questions

  1. What is the supported way to make Shipping Type 17 (LTL) available?

  2. Do we have to raise a Request Expert Configuration so SAP copies SFO2 and sets Shipping Type 17, or is there any self-service alternative?

  3. Could condition-based FO-type determination switch between FTL and LTL at planning/tender time?

  4. Any best-practice tips from projects that already solved this?

(See screenshot below – Shipping Type is locked on FTL.)

 

The ultimate situation I would like is if I can manually choose between FTL or LTL. 

Thanks for any insights!

Best regards,
Floris

entry.title: Schedule Daily Delta Accruals - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello all, 

We are facing a challenge with "Schedule Contract Settlement - Customer Contracts" app in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud. 

We are looking to schedule the Delta Accruals settlement to run recurringly (daily), considering only the period up to the execution date. 

However, we've encountered the following behavior: 

      - The app requires a fixed settlement date.

      - If a broad date range is entered (e.g 01.01 - 31.12), the system processes the entire period at once.

      - There does not appear to be an option to use a dynamic date

We would like to know if there is any official or recommended approach to schedule Delta Accruals with a dynamic settlement date (e.g "today"). 

Thank you in advance for any guidance.

entry.title: Migration Template not available for App " Manage Rentable Object" in SAP CLM
entry.content:
In SAP Contract and Lease Management, Migration Template is not available for Application " Manage Rentable Object" but the Template is available for Application "Manage usable Object". How to get it, Please guide.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: ADOBE Forms does not display custom field contents
entry.content:
Hello

I have been facing a situation that would like to share with you and possibly get any help just in case you faced the same situation before.

We had to add a bunch of custom fields in the “Sales Order” and “Sales Order Item” contexts.

Then we implemented two BADIs that populates those custom fields according to a certain set of rules as soon as a sales order is entered into the system.

After the custom fields are populated we need to have them printed in the “Sales Order” output template. In order to achieve that we customized the “Output form template” through Adobe LiveCycle Designer to accommodate such fields. The customized layout was imported back into a new form template and all the required configuration to have it available was performed: output parameter definitions, in S/4, form template assignment and master form template assignment, in CBC.

The sales order gets printed out but all the custom fields shows nothing as if they had no content at all.

After investigating the issue, I realized that outputs with the state “In Preparation” shows the custom fields data. But if the state moves to Completed, the data are no more displayed.

I found some posts asking to extend the data source related to the output template by adding the custom fields. The conclusion is that having or not having the data source extended had no impact on the result.

The custom fields appear in the user interface, the BADIs populate them correctly, the data is persisted into the data base but they do not get printed in the report unless the output state is “In preparation”.

Important to say that the system I am referring to is the S/4HANA Public Cloud, with the Brazilian localization.

Has anybody faced this situation before?

Regards,

Salim

entry.title: How to Identify Production Orders with Staging Performed via Movement Type 311?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

In our S/4HANA system, we are using the Fiori app "Stage Materials for Production" to carry out material staging to the production supply area. For tracking and audit purposes, we would like to find out which production orders have had staging movements executed using movement type 311.

Is there any standard report, Fiori app, or CDS view available that allows us to retrieve this information—specifically, a way to list all production orders that have had a 311 movement posted?

Any insights or suggestions are highly appreciated!

Thanks in advance,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Stock Transfer for Reservation
entry.content:
When Warehouse exist in normal sales order to delivery process, the system behavior is as follows:

Outbound Delivery is created with reference to the sales order document. In the Outbound Delivery, the batches are not considered and we can save the delivery without batches which is distributed to the Warehouse Process. In the App 'Run Outbound Process - Deliveries', when we click on the Create Tasks - batches are picked based on FIFO & Manual we complete the process.

For Stock Transfer for Reservation, the batches should not be considered the similar way. Outbound Delivery should be created without batches & batch should be picked when we create the Warehouse Task in 'Run Outbound Process - Deliveries'.

entry.title: Selective CBC Transport with company code in public cloud
entry.content:
Hi, Is it possible to transport the configuration on CBC with company code? 

Ex) Transport the config for company A / Not transport for company B.

Trying to find out the related information then looks the development team is aware of the requirement, but it seems still not be ready in the latest version of public cloud . Really appreciate if any advice.

entry.title: Overall Budget control in SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear All,

Our customer is moving system from ECC.6 to Public Cloud.

Existing budget is overall no need to specify fiscal year, specify only WBS.

But in Public Cloud have to specify Fiscal year. How to config if I don't want to specify year when control budget is overall.

 
 

 

Best regards,

Keratiya D.

entry.title: How to Enable Mass Data Upload for a Custom Business Object in SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I have created a Custom Business Object (CBO) in SAP Public Cloud, using an Employee data table as an example. I have also added a custom catalog extension, and the CBO tile currently allows adding only one entry at a time. However, I need to enable mass data upload functionality directly within the CBO, without relying on external tools.

Could anyone share suggestions or step-by-step guidance on how to implement mass data upload for a Custom Business Object in SAP Public Cloud? Any insights or best practices would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance for your help!

entry.title: 未找到可用供应商的业务对象
entry.content:
需求：通过代码调用业务对象创建供应商，即 BP 的 FLVN01 FLVN01 角色

BP 的业务对象 i_businesspartnertp_3 中只提供了扩展角色功能，但是没有维护如 公司 和 采购组织层级数据。

单独查找供应商相关业务对象，只找到 I_SUPPLIERLISTTP_2 ，但是已经标记为废弃，是否有其他可用的业务对象，能创建和更新供应商的公司和采购层级数据？

entry.title: No data in Cloud SAPS4 HANA
entry.content:
We have provisioned the SAP S4 PERSON_NAME Cloud environment but that's blank fully and we are unable to use it. Kindly help us with sample data in it so that we can use the instance.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Report of YCOA accounting accounts against alternative mapped accounts
entry.content:
Hello, SAP friends:

I'm trying to get a report showing the YCOA accounting accounts and the alternative accounts that those companies have mapped, but I can't get it.

I will comment in more detail with a concrete example.

I have this YCOA account: 6023000000

If I go inside and go to the Company Code Assignment section, I have an alternative accounting account (from a local chart of accounts) mapped to a specific company.


So, with this mapping what I want is to be able to see it in a table like the initial one. For example, adding the alternative account column to see this mapping.

6023000000 VS 0060221000

Would it be possible to do that in SAP?

Thank you in advance.

Best regards,

Ismael.

entry.title: GST Condition IN TRM
entry.content:
Dear Sir/ Mam


For maintaining GST detail business partner wise there is an app " Map tax cash flow to tax relevant cash flow" but while maintaining this System is asking to saving the same in transport request but as this is just a master data where we need to maintain these tax record at business partner level


Is their a approach to maintain the same directly in Production Server


Thanks


Prerana Sirohiya


PHONE_NUMBER


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: "WIP is not getting reduced at the time of Partial GR on the Production order"
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

I have a question related to the Production order postings in S/4 HANA Public Cloud. I have created a Production Order. I did Partial Goods Issue, Activity Confirmation. For these 2 steps, the WIP entries got posted correctly and verified it. But at the time of Partial goods receipt, the target cost should hit, Actual Cost and WIP should be reduced. Actual cost has been reduced but the WIP is not. Target costs hit correctly. Then I proceeded further by doing Final Goods Issue in order to check the process how it was working, but no WIP entries posted from this process. 

Can anyone tell me the reason/why it was processing like this? Looking for the inputs.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: 生产订单联产品结算规则必填
entry.content:
业务背景：

常规业务场景下，产品的联产品会有产出，但由于生产工艺的临时调整或者产品特性的变化，导致原先设定的联产品未产出

系统功能限制：

存在联产品的生产订单，如果该生产订单中存在已经入库的产品，此时即便是未入库的联产品，也无法从生产订单组件中删除，并且，生产订单中联产品的结算规则，为必填字段，无法设置为空，因此，如果产品未产出，但是因为系统功能的控制，联产品的结算规则同样需要维护，最终会对成本分摊存在影响

entry.title: 依据生产订单预留创建领料申请
entry.content:
业务背景：

基于客户的业务，一个产品一个月维护一张大的生产订单，因此对于生产订单中的原材料需求来讲，只有一个月的总需求，数量，但是生产发生领料时，生产部门需要按照实际到仓库领料的数量填写领料需求，并由仓库人员依据生产部门维护的领料申请，直接将领料申请的数量发料至生产订单

业务需求：

生产部门可以直接依据生产订单组件维护创建领料预留（申请），领料申请的数量与实际到仓库领料数量一致，并且仓库可以直接依据生产部门创建的领料申请过账，物料直接发料至生产订单，因此是否有标准的功能（APP）能够支持此需求？

entry.title: Custom Analytical Query with navigation
entry.content:
I'm creating an custom Analytical Query using cds view annotations (adt) in Public Cloud.

I plan to make it look like this but the amount to be clickable like a hotspot and navigate to another application.

  Period 1Period 2Period 3
GL AccountAssignment ReferenceAmountAmountAmount
12XXXXXXXX100100100

is it possible to achieve this or are there any other approach?

entry.title: Posting failed: Unable to post using posting rule F020 – Bill of Exchange Payable.
entry.content:
Dear expert,

I attempted to create a manual bank statement and selected F020 (Bill of Exchange Payable) as the manual transaction in one of the line items. According to the SAP Help Portal, this posting rule is classified as a one-step posting, meaning it should only affect the bank ledger.

However, upon clicking the Post button, the following information message appeared:

Message: Statement posted: 0 items completed, 1 item not completed

No error or warning messages were displayed within the bank statement itself, so I’m unclear why the posting could not be completed successfully.

Could you kindly advise on the cause or necessary action?

Thank you in advance for your support.

Best regards, 

HY

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance   FIN (Finance)

entry.title: How to translate ABAP Cloud Multidimensional Analysis (MDA) App Fiori App Title?
entry.content:
Hello Everyone!

I have created an MDA App in S/4HANA Public Cloud, Is there any way I can translate my Launchpad App Descriptor Item? The Maintain Translations app doesn't pick it up.

 

Thank you in advances!
